channel.title: IPA - Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

channel.itunes:summary: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

itunes:owner.itunes:name: Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!

item.title: Clown Shoes Beer: Muffin Top, Ep. 176
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we explore the world of the Muffin Top! Clown Shoes has whipped up a HUGE Belgian Style Tripel IPA using a good amount of hops and a Belgian yeast strain . This is another nice addition to the rise of the Belgo style of beers we’re seeing all across […]

The post Clown Shoes Beer: Muffin Top, Ep. 176 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Bottles vs. Cans, Ep. 166
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
We at Beer America TV have been talking about it on and off for the past couple of years on our blogs, but it was time to put it to the test. The question, does beer taste better in a bottle or a can? We take two beers, Ranger IPA from New Belgium, and Torpedo […]

The post Bottles vs. Cans, Ep. 166 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Dogfish Head: Squall IPA, Ep. 160
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week Beer America TV tackles yet one more beer from Dogfish Head. Squall IPA is basically a 100% bottle conditioned version of their 90 Minute IPA thats dry hopped . Another excellent IPA which is by no means a surprise coming from Dogfish! The good news is, this beer should cellar well, the bad […]

The post Dogfish Head: Squall IPA, Ep. 160 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Flying Dog Brewery: Raging Bitch, Ep. 159
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week, Beer America TV goes Belgo, as in Belgian IPA! This relatively new style of beer seems to be growing in popularity and Flying Dog has a good one in the form of a Raging Bitch! Pulled from their Canis Major series of beers, which are normally reserved for one-offs and special editions, Raging […]

The post Flying Dog Brewery: Raging Bitch, Ep. 159 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Avery Brewing Company: Avery IPA, Ep. 155
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
OK, so we shot a handful of green screen episodes, we have to edit them! This week on Beer America TV we tackle another IPA, this time from Avery Brewing . Avery IPA is an excellent IPA with a nice malt balance. If you’re looking for an IPA that’s not to bitter and a session […]

The post Avery Brewing Company: Avery IPA, Ep. 155 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Summit Brewing: Horizon Red Ale, Ep. 144
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we tackle a truly unique brew from the Summit Brewing Company located in St. Paul, Minnesota . Horizon Red Ale is an interesting blend of an IPA and Amber ale that uses a variety of malts from America, England and Germany and adds the hard to find Horizon hops […]

The post Summit Brewing: Horizon Red Ale, Ep. 144 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Bear Republic Brewing: Racer 5 IPA, Ep. 134
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
IPA’s come in many different forms, some bitter, some almost sweet. This week on Beer America TV, we’re talking about Racer 5 from Bear Republic Brewing, which does an excellent job balancing both . This 4-time GABF medal winner is another great example of what a quality IPA should taste like! Now why in the […]

The post Bear Republic Brewing: Racer 5 IPA, Ep. 134 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Maui Brewing Company Big Swell IPA, Ep. 109
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Another week and another Maui Brewing Company beer review with our good friend Dow Scoggins. This week we are discussing Maui Brewing Companies Big Swell IPA. As they say on their website, Big Swell is Big, Hoppy, Bold, Smooth, and Hoppy….did we mention Hoppy? Boy are they right! We found this one to be very […]

The post Maui Brewing Company Big Swell IPA, Ep. 109 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
